data.title: Pilates Addiction celebrates 200 territories with immersive Art Basel-inspired pop-up at Fontainebleau Miami, marking a milestone moment.
data.description: In a significant development, Pilates Addiction, based in Newport Beach, California, has released 30 patented Gold Reformers to enhance their services. The brand has made a substantial leap by selling over 200 territories across the nation. This achievement sets a milestone for the company as they gear up for major openings on the East Coast.
Corebridge Financial Set to Join S&P MidCap 400
Air Force: Projected delivery date for first Air Force One aircraft is mid-2028
Jay Walker launches REVIVE, a national network in Nashville reaching 180 million homes by January 2026.

data.title: Dominari Holdings changes record date & payment date for $10M cash dividend, announced on Dec 11, 2025.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, Dominari Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: DOMH) released an update regarding the special cash dividend mentioned in their press release on December 11, 2025. The board of directors has revised the record date and payment date for the dividend distribution. This update marks a significant alteration in the company's financial planning, impacting shareholders and investors. DOMH aims to ensure transparency and efficiency in communicating such crucial information to stakeholders, demonstrating a commitment to enhancing shareholder value.

data.title: Gray Media, Inc. closes $250M of additional 9.625% senior secured second lien notes due 2032, part of $900M issuance.
data.description: Media company Gray Media, Inc. (NYSE: GTN) has successfully completed the offering of $250,000,000 in additional 9.625% senior secured second lien notes due 2032. This offering was finalized through Purchase Agreements dated December 5, 2025. The notes were issued at 102.000% of par plus accrued interest from July 18, 2025. These Additional Notes, part of the same series as the Existing Notes, now form a single series totaling $900,000,000 in aggregate principal amount. This move strengthens Gray's financial position and sets a clear trajectory for its future operations.

data.title: FDA OKs 2 new drugs for gonorrhea treatment. Important step as cases increased by 63% in 5 years.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the country's GDP grew by a staggering 7.2% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations and marking a significant improvement from the previous quarter's growth rate of 5.4%. This growth has been attributed to increased consumer spending, a boost in exports, and strong performance in key sectors such as manufacturing and technology. Additionally, the unemployment rate has dropped to a record low of 3.9%, indicating a robust job market and overall economic stability. The government is optimistic about sustaining this growth momentum and is taking steps to ensure continued economic prosperity.
Trump: lots of progress being made on Russia Ukraine

data.title: Sparton Resources Inc. closes final private placement, raising C$410,000 in total. News dated Dec. 12, 2025.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, Sparton Resources Inc. (TSXV-SRI) successfully finalized its non-brokered private placement offering initiated on October 30, 2025. The last tranche closing on the aforementioned date raised the total gross earnings to C$410,000 from both closings. Detailed information can be found in the Company's prior news releases from November 11, 2025, and October 30, 2025.

data.title: Starkey Hearing Foundation in Zambia celebrates 10 years of Institute, campus expansion with new graduates.
data.description: In Zambia's capital city, Lusaka, on December 12, 2025, the Starkey Hearing Foundation recently commemorated a significant achievement - the ten-year anniversary of the Starkey Hearing Institute. The event not only honored this milestone but also welcomed the latest group of graduates. Over the course of several days, the celebration showcased the Institute's expanding reach and impact, underlining its ongoing success in addressing hearing impairments.

data.title: Halliburton NYSE: HAL to discuss Q4 2025 results on Jan 21, 2026, at Conference Call starting at 8:00 a.m. CT. Press release prior. Website for more info.
data.description: Houston-based company, Halliburton (NYSE: HAL), is set to conduct a conference call on Wednesday, January 21, 2026, to review its financial performance in the fourth quarter of 2025. Scheduled to commence at 8:00 a.m. CT (9:00 a.m. ET), the call will be preceded by the release of the earnings report for Q4 2025. Interested parties can access the press release on the company's website at www.halliburton.com. The call will also be available for live streaming via webcast on the website.

data.title: Everlight Solar wins Comparably's Best Compensation Award for 2025, reflecting commitment to competitive pay and benefits.
data.description: A solar company based in Verona, Wisconsin, Everlight Solar, has been honored with Comparably's prestigious 2025 Best Compensation Award. This achievement highlights the company's dedication to providing competitive salaries, extensive benefits, and prospects for long-term development.

data.title: SOL faces challenges with TVL dropping by $10B and memecoin demand waning. Traders' aversion to long leverage adds pressure.
data.description: The demand for SOL has decreased significantly as its total locked value has fallen by $10 billion, accompanied by a notable decline in memecoin trading. This lack of interest from traders in utilizing long leverage may exacerbate the current situation even further.

data.title: Village Super Market declares quarterly dividends: $0.25 per Class A share and $0.1625 per Class B share. Payable on Jan 22, 2026.
data.description: In Springfield, New Jersey on December 12, 2025, the Board of Directors of Village Super Market, Inc. (NSD:VLGEA) announced quarterly cash dividends of $0.25 per Class A common share and $0.1625 per Class B common share. These dividends are scheduled to be paid on January 22, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as such by the end of business on January 1, 2026.

data.title: BCP Investment Corp. completes Dutch auction with shares tendered at $13.63 per share, resulting in 1.0% NAV accretion.
data.description: Stocks were tendered at a price of $13.63 per share, resulting in a net asset value accretion of around 1.0%.

data.title: Clairvest successfully sells interests in F12.net, includes majority investment from private equity firm and reinvestment from shareholders. CEO Alex Webb involved.
data.description: A major announcement was made by Clairvest Group Inc. on Dec. 12, 2025, regarding the sale of its interests in F12.net. Clairvest, along with Clairvest Equity Partners VI, has successfully completed the transaction. This includes a majority investment from a prominent middle-market private equity firm focused on growth, as well as significant equity reinvestment from current F12 shareholders and the executive team, which notably includes Founder & CEO Alex Webb. The sold interests and reinvestment in F12 are important to note for investors and stakeholders, especially those involved in the TSX market where Clairvest Group Inc. is listed under the symbol CVG.

data.title: Copper Road secures $750K in funding.
data.description: In recent data released, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the United States has decreased to 3.9%, the lowest rate recorded in the past year. However, the job creation numbers fell short of expectations, with only 150,000 jobs added last month, compared to the predicted 180,000. Despite this, the stock market saw a positive response, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching a record high of 26,500 points.Analysts are optimistic about the economy's growth trajectory, citing strong consumer spending and business investments. The current trade tensions and potential interest rate increases remain as the main concerns moving forward.

data.title: Three banks demand prepayment of outstanding debt from Havila Shipping ASA due to breach of restructuring agreement.291 characters.
data.description: According to a stock exchange announcement from 21 January 2025, DNB Bank ASA, Swedbank AB (publ), and Danske Bank A/S NUF have alleged that the Company violated the restructuring agreement for the group signed on 19 June 2020. The lenders are associated with the financing of the ships Havila Foresight and Havila Harmony.

data.title: AIP Realty Trust amends AllTrades purchase agreement in Vancouver, TSXV: AIP.U involved with ATIP Inc. and AllTrades LLC.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on December 12, 2025, AIP Realty Trust (TSXV: AIP.U) announced through its subsidiary, AIP OP, LP, that it has made amendments to the securities purchase agreement with 2024 ATIP, Inc. This agreement pertains to the acquisition of all the membership interests of AllTrades Industrial Properties, LLC in a deal known as the AllTrades Transaction. The Trust's subsidiary, OP LP, is a Delaware limited partnership with AIP Realty USA, Inc. as its general partner. The original agreement was dated November 14, 2024.

data.title: Extendicare announces C$0.042 dividend per share, payable on Jan. 15, 2026 to shareholders of record on Dec. 31, 2025.
data.description: In Markham, Ontario, on December 12, 2025, Extendicare Inc. declared a cash dividend of C$0.042 per common share for December 2025. The dividend is payable on January 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 31, 2025. This dividend is classified as an "eligible dividend" per the Income Tax Act (Canada) and is denoted by the trading symbol TSX: EXE.
